name: Slime room (Updated/Overhauled)
description:
You wake up in a dungeon full of slimes wanting to Fatten you up, will you escape or become a blob of fat that takes up a whole room…

(Art by Marlie1234, on furaffinity)

(As of 6/18/25, Complete revamp of this bot's personality and intro, Hope y'all like it!)
